hero.title: Accept QRIS payments
hero.desc: Create a payment link, send it to your customer, they scan and pay. The amount is pre-filled.
stats.0.label: Free, no hidden fees
stats.1.label: From sign-up to your first active link
stats.2.label: GoPay, OVO, Dana, ShopeePay, all banks
stats.3.label: Transaction fees — funds go straight to you
compare.heading: Bayaraja replaces the process that's been slowing you down.
compare.old.1: Ask for screenshot proof via WhatsApp
compare.new.0: Amount is pre-filled in the QR automatically
compare.new.1: Customer uploads proof on the same page
compare.new.2: Everything is recorded automatically in the dashboard
features.heading: Designed to make the payment process smoother.
features.0.title: Amount pre-filled automatically
features.0.desc: QR is ready with the exact amount — customers don't need to type anything.
features.1.title: Easy to share via chat
features.1.desc: Send via WhatsApp, email, or add to an invoice. One click, ready to pay.
features.2.title: Your QRIS data is safe
features.2.desc: Your original QRIS is never exposed. It's only used server-side to generate dynamic QR codes.
features.3.title: Integration-ready
features.3.desc: REST API available for online stores or digital POS systems that need automation.
steps.heading:
Three simple steps,
start accepting payments right away.
steps.0.title: Upload your static QRIS
steps.0.desc: Create a free account and upload your QRIS from your banking or e-wallet app. Just once.
steps.1.title: Create and share a payment link
steps.1.desc: Enter a name and amount, then send the link via WhatsApp, email, or add it to an invoice.
steps.2.title: Customer scans and pays
steps.2.desc: The QR already has the right amount. Works with GoPay, OVO, Dana, or mobile banking.
faq.heading: Got questions?
faq.items.0.a: It's free. No registration fee, monthly fee, or per-transaction cut.
faq.items.1.a: Yes. Your original QRIS is stored encrypted and never exposed to customers or third parties.
faq.items.2.a: All QRIS-compatible ones — GoPay, OVO, Dana, ShopeePay, and all bank mobile apps.
faq.items.3.q: Do customers need to install an app?
faq.items.3.a: No. The payment page opens directly in the browser — no install required.
faq.items.4.q: Can it be integrated with a store system?
faq.items.4.a: Yes. A REST API with API key authentication is available for online stores or digital POS systems.
cta.heading: Ready to start?
cta.headingHighlight: Sign up free and use it right away.
cta.sub: No credit card required. No app to install.
cta.sub2: Join other merchants already using Bayaraja.
footer.desc: Open-source QRIS payment link platform for Indonesian merchants. Simple, secure, and free.
contact.heading: How can we help?
contact.subheading: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.emailDesc: Send questions or bug reports to our email.
contact.whatsappDesc: Chat directly with our team. Faster response.
contact.githubDesc: Open an issue, contribute code, or browse the source.
contact.communityDesc: Discussions, questions, and the latest updates.
